summary: Frontend-only smoke test of RupeeLog Phase 1 on the Expo web preview. All 6 user-flow scenarios from the review request PASSED end-to-end. Onboarding (3 slides, name input, currency modal with INR/USD/EUR/GBP/AED, allow access) -> Home shows greeting with stored name 'Alex' and ₹3,248 month total from seeds; reload bypasses onboarding correctly. Home shows hero card (Income/Expenses/Net), 6-month bar chart, and all 5 seeded expenses (Zomato, Petrol, Netflix, Metro, DMart). Tab nav switches between Home/Expenses/Groups/Insights with 'Coming soon' placeholders on the latter three. FAB opens the Add Expense bottom sheet. Calculator builds amount correctly (1->5->0 = ₹150). Save Expense button is disabled at ₹0 and enabled at ₹150. After saving 'Uber ride' (Transport, Cash), it appears at top of Recent and Month total increases from ₹3,248 to ₹3,398 (delta exactly 150). Backdrop tap closes the sheet without persisting the typed amount (₹9 was NOT saved; total stayed at ₹3,398). No red screens, no JS pageerror, only minor RN-web deprecation warnings. No deprecated Expo packages detected (expo-av, expo-barcode-scanner, expo-background-fetch not used).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Web-only warning from React Native Web. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx:312-315 (shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius on .fab) and possibly cardShadow in /app/frontend/src/theme. Native (iOS) still requires shadow* so a Platform.select with boxShadow on web is the proper fix.

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/onboarding.tsx:165 (View has pointerEvents="none" as a prop). Move to style={{ pointerEvents: 'none' }}.

action_items: Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow on web (Platform.select) to silence RN-web deprecation warnings (FAB in tabs/index.tsx and any cardShadow definition).
Replace View pointerEvents prop with style.pointerEvents in onboarding.tsx:165 to silence deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have testID, components are properly wrapped in <Text>, dark-theme spacing/8pt grid looks clean. No backend code in scope.
db.ts cleanly branches Platform.OS === 'web' to a real localStorage-backed store (NOT mocked). Seeds 5 expenses idempotently.
seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage at test start; db.ts auto-seeded 5 expenses (Zomato 349, Petrol 800, Netflix 649, Metro 200, DMart 1250 = ₹3,248). One additional 'Uber ride' ₹150 added during Add Expense test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional on web. Tested via https://rupee-tracker-237.preview.emergentagent.com at 390x844 mobile viewport. Use localStorage.clear() before each test run to reset onboarding + seeds. Key testIDs: onboarding-screen, get-started-button, name-input, currency-selector, currency-option-<CODE>, continue-button, allow-access-button, home-screen, user-name, month-total, expense-row-<id>, tab-home/expenses/groups/insights, add-fab, add-expense-screen, amount-display, calc-key-<k>, category-chip-<Key>, payment-chip-<Method>, merchant-input, save-expense-button, backdrop.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Only two non-blocking RN-web deprecation warnings (shadow* and pointerEvents prop) which do not affect functionality.
